resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def vowelStrings(self, words: List[str], left: int, right: int) -> int:
        vowels = set('aeiou')
        return sum(1 for i in range(left, right + 1) if words[i][0] in vowels and words[i][-1] in vowels)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a set to store vowel characters and a generator expression to iterate over the range [left, right] and check if each word starts and ends with a vowel character, incrementing a counter for each match.
